---
title: "AD Computer Conversion Guide — Canonical Input to Phase 4 Device Planes"
subtitle: "Architecture Decision Record · ADR-042 · draft"
date: 2026-04-20
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Architecture Decision Record

**ADR-042** — status: **draft** — decided: **2026-04-20**

This page renders the canonical ADR source verbatim. The authoritative
source is at [`src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-042-ad-computer-conversion-guide-integration.md`](../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-042-ad-computer-conversion-guide-integration.md).
Any change to this ADR's content happens in the source file; this
wrapper is regenerated by `scripts/generate_adr_qmd_wrappers.py` per
[ADR-072](adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-042-ad-computer-conversion-guide-integration.md >}}
